text:
Created attachment 195299
Patch

My report was version 0.2 but the commit was the head version (https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=474820). In this version the port requires wx-3.0 (see http://beefy9.nyi.freebsd.org/data/111amd64-default/474922/logs/diff-pdf-0.2.27.log).
Poudriere passed (log: http://freebsd.uzsolt.hu/logs/graphics/diff-pdf/11amd64-head/diff-pdf-0.2.27.log).
